name: Quick Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 cups no salt tomato or V-8 juice
1 teaspoon garlic powder (NOT garlic salt) or fresh/bottled garlic
1 teaspoon finely chopped cilantro (in Hawaii=Chinese parsley)
Pepper sauce to taste (try 10 drops first)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12 oz jar, add onions.
2. Add all other dried, fresh, or frozen ingredients: cumin, oregano, garlic powder, and cilantro.
3. Pour in the tomato juice or V-8 juice and hot sauce/pepper to taste.
4. Seal the jar tightly.
5. Let sit overnight in the refrigerator.
6. Open the jar, add more juice if needed to top, and shake very well before serving.
Note: You can buy fresh green onion and cilantro, chop them, and freeze them in a zip-lock baggie for future use.
